programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Soap Opera Party
programme.desc: Ross invites an attractive paleontologist (Aisha Tyler) to a rooftop "Days of Our Lives" party being thrown by Joey.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon faces a crisis of confidence when he is forced to work with his nemesis, Barry Kripke; Raj and Howard buy expensive action figures of themselves.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A fight between Sheldon and Leonard impacts Amy and Penny's living arrangements; while Howard is away, Raj helps Mrs. Wolowitz out.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys search for a perfect Valentine's Day gift for their significant others; Stuart and Raj host a "lonely people" party at the comic book store.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a bad date, Koothrappali decides to never leave his apartment; Penny's acting skills impress Sheldon.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Wolowitz talk to junior high girls about science-related careers; Raj plans a date with Lucy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler run into an old acquaintance when they secretly go to a fertility clinic; Ross helps Joey woo the same professor (Aisha Tyler) he wants to date.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler interview unsuspecting candidates, hoping to find the right man to father their baby.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang heads to Barbados for a paleontology convention where Ross is the keynote speaker; David (Hank Azaria) prepares to propose to Phoebe, but ex-boyfriend Mike (Paul Rudd) is not yet out of the picture.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey & Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: In Barbados, Monica, Chandler and Phoebe eavesdrop on their friends' passionate encounters; Monica styles her hair to look like a blowfish; Phoebe and Mike rekindle their romance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
programme.desc: Ross drinks too much alcohol at dinner with Rachel, Joey and Charlie; Frank Jr. (Giovanni Ribisi) cannot cope with his precocious triplets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire decides to clean the clutter out of the house before taking over Jay's business; Jay's new hobby makes Cameron worry; Gloria enlists Mitchell to teach her how to golf so she can connect with Jay on a deeper level.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil doesn't feel appreciated while Claire is busy running the closet business; a life-size standee of Gloria for her hot sauce display attracts unsavory attention; Cam and Mitch become suspicious of their new renters.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Power outages during a thunderstorm send the whole family to Jay and Gloria's; Jay tries to make it to a reunion with buddies from the Navy; Phil hopes to redeem himself after a panic attack; Mitch and Cam must salvage Lily's birthday party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin and Tina decide to take the honeymoon they never had to Madrid; Dave and Gemma team up with Malcolm and Marty on a project intended to surprise Calvin upon his return.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Tina insists Calvin find something to do in retirement, he decides to enter a competitive cornhole tournament; Marty plans an elaborate "groom-posal" to ask Malcolm to be his best man.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: A bombshell about Marty's future plans leaves Calvin and Tina reeling; Dave unleashes his wild side at Marty's bachelor party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob suspects Patrick of stealing his jellyfishing net; SpongeBob builds a ventriloquist dummy modeled after Squidward.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Humsquatch; Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: When Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble, the PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch; when a robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay, Ryder knows just who to call.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups Charged Up: Pups Stop a Humdinger Horde; Mighty Pups Charged Up: Pups Save a Mighty Lighthouse
programme.desc: The Mighty Pups have to save the day when Harold makes a cloning machine; Harold uses his superpowers to turn Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse into a rocket.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Box Fort; Pups Save Travelin' Travis From Really Big Bill
programme.desc: The Pups must save Rocky and Humdinger from a runaway box fort; when Skye helps Traveling Travis search for Big Bill Island, the misguided explorer gets carried away by a really, really big bird.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Pups Stop a Big Bad Bot; Mighty Pups, Charged Up: Mighty Pups Versus the Dome
programme.desc: When Harold Humdinger uses a giant robot to take the buildings of Adventure Bay and make his own town, the Mighty Pups must save the day; the Copycat is back, and Adventure Bay needs a Mighty Rescue when he traps the entire town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Clubhouse Takeaway; Walkie Talkies; Peppa's Office; What Babies Do; Lenses
programme.desc: Suzy describes a takeout meal she had; Grandpa Pig creates a watering system; Mummy and Daddy Pig work hard in their home office; Peppa visits Cousin Chloe's house to play; at the playground, Pedro and Penny's glasses fall off.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups and the Big Twin Trick; Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own; Mayor Humdinger finally gets superpowers, and it's a total cat-astrophe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Risky Race; Rescue Wheels: Pups Save the Runaway Truck
programme.desc: When Boomer challenges Roxi in a race to the top of a mountain, his reckless driving causes an avalanche of boulders.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Disappearing Flounder; Pups Save Little Grandpa and Mr. Alex
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's ship disappears, the PAW Patrol must venture into the mysterious Adventure Bay Triangle to find the missing vessel; when Alex and Mr. Porter swap roles, the pups must help track down the Mini-Patrol after they go missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Chicken Conductor; Pups Save the Digi Tal Stylists
programme.desc: Chickaletta is left driving the train after an enormous chicken floaty launches Engineer Ed out the window; when Katie needs to close the Pet Parlor early, Digi and Tal volunteer to keep the shop open.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Alex's Feathery Friends; Pups Save a Puffy Mayor
programme.desc: The "PAW Patrol" must rescue Mr. Porter and reunite an ostrich family before the big birds get into trouble; During Mayor Goodway's fashion show, the pups must save Farmer Al and Mayor Humdinger after Humdinger's puffy shirt floats away with them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Mega Stunt Ramp; The Crew Builds a Solar Farm
programme.desc: The crew uses their trucks to make stunt ramps when Mega Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition; when power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends; Daisy and Mr Crocodile invite a new friend to live with them.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save Adventure Bay
programme.desc: Two competitive truckers come to town for a monster truck rally, one of them befriends the pups, the other stirs up lots of trouble.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups and Cats Save HumCatDingerMan; Pups Save a Turbot Tournament
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger becomes HumCatDingerMan to steal the spotlight from Cat Pack; the pups must save Tilly during the Turbot Tournament.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward and Bubble Bass are forced to tolerate each other's company on a trip to Shell City; Squidward takes a trip inside the imagination box and must rely on SpongeBob and Patrick's creativity in order to escape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods; SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When the Krusty Krab runs out of mustard, Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward to dig up some more; SpongeBob and Sandy have to collect Krabby Patty ingredients, but Plankton follows their every step.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his precious alarm clock, but nothing else is loud enough to wake him up on time; Karen quickly learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a safety training video. Patrick works at the mall.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Chatterbox Gary; Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm; when a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Pearl becomes a star player after joining her high school football team.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob befriends a sentient Krabby Patty whose only wish is to be eaten; Rube hosts an episode of "FUN-Believable! With Rube" where he explores little known oddities and attractions around Bikini Bottom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick discover a surprising link to their favorite Kelpbed Kid; chaos ensues as everyone in Bikini Bottom starts meeping.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince the wooden-headed star to steal him a Krabby Patty; when Mr. Krabs puts in an open kitchen, SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Evolving from single-celled yellow organisms at the dawn of time, Minions live to serve, but find themselves working for a continual series of unsuccessful masters, from T. Rex to Napoleon. Without a master to grovel for, the Minions fall into a deep depression. But one minion, Kevin, has a plan; accompanied by his pals Stuart and Bob, Kevin sets forth to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. Their search leads them to Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever super-villainess.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel and Joey nervously anticipate their first real date; Monica and Phoebe try to avoid an obnoxious friend with a fake British accent; Ross emerges from a tanning booth with a two-toned appearance.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel gets Monica and Chandler to delay their trip to Vermont for Emma's first birthday bash.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard receives an exciting opportunity to work overseas, Penny and Sheldon are thrown for a loop.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel feels like her younger sister, Amy, is finally on the verge of making a major change in her attitude; in order to help Amy become a more responsible person, Rachel overrides Ross' strong protests and allows Amy to baby-sit Emma.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Ross interviews with Charlie's ex-boyfriend (Greg Kinnear) for a prized grant, the doctor makes a shocking stipulation; Chandler lies about watching Joey's bizarre audition tape.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker, Laura; Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a children's charity.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Late Thanksgiving

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birth Mother

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears as a celebrity contestant on "$100,000 Pyramid"; Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper for Phoebe's bachelorette party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Unaware that Claire has a personal assistant, Phil cannot figure out how she is getting everything done; Jay and Gloria are sleep-deprived as Joe goes through a fussy phase; Cam and Mitch feel they are not treated well at a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil lies to Claire to keep her from finding out about his attractive new client; Gloria asks for Claire's help in dealing with a yoga instructor she thinks is attracted to her; Jay makes a web show; Mitch and Cam teach Lily how to ride a bike.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil decides he wants to take a spontaneous trip to Paris with Claire, but they are both exhausted; Jay's command of the bathroom remodel creates hazards for the rest of the family; Cam's visiting sister's emotional outbursts frustrate Mitch.

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Tina; Gemma works a connection to actor Jerry O'Connell, whose kids attend Walcott Academy, to secure VIP tickets to "The Talk" for her school's fundraiser.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin and Marty encounter difficulties trying to secure financing for their new business; Dave invites his boss to Grover's 13th birthday party, much to Gemma's frustration.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy; Plankton grows a second eye and becomes nice.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Ace's Birthday Surprise; Pups Save a Tower of Pizza
programme.desc: Rocky and the pups fix an old junk car for Ace Sorensen's birthday; Adventure Bay works hard to earn the record for having the world's highest tower of pizzas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Take in a Runaway Kitty!; Pups Save the Cheese Goat!
programme.desc: When Rocky Kitty runs away and tries to join the "PAW Patrol," he helps the pups rescue Humdinger and the kitties from a hang-glider ride; when the Good Neighbor Robots confuse Farmer Al's request, they wind up being the target of a hungry eagle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Jukebox; Pups Save a Mayor on a Wire
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger steals a jukebox so he can play an annoying song all day long, but Chase and Rubble track it down to save the records; a hungry eagle causes Mayor Goodway's tightrope walking lesson to go awry, sending her down Jake's Mountain.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Bat Family; Pups Save a Mud Monster
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol works to free a bat family after a rock slide traps them inside their cave; snowboarders on Jake's Mountain become stuck on a broken chairlift while a monster is on the loose.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Bears; Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol works quietly to save sleeping bears and return them to their cave; with the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle animals and control the chaos on a farmerless farm.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Katie and Some Kitties; Pups Save a Helo Humdinger
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger tricks Katie into watching his kitties, an alarm system is set off and the PAW Patrol must rescue them; when Mayor Humdinger swipes one of Ryder's early inventions he must be rescued from an out-of-control flight.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Rescue Wheels: Pups Save Adventure Bay; Pups vs the Monster Mayor; Pups Save the Teetering Tower; Pups Save the Spelunkers; Pups Save the Risky Race
programme.desc: The heroic rescue pups, led by a tech-savvy boy named Ryder work together to protect the community; geared with special skills, gadgets and vehicles that help them on their rescue missions, the PAW Patrol is always up for the challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Jungle Penguins; Pups Save a Freighter
programme.desc: When an ice floe carrying three penguins lands in the jungle, the pups must get the birds back to their frosty home; Daring Danny is locked out of the lighthouse Turbot left him to look after, with a freighter headed his way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Honey; Pups Save Mayor Goodway's Purse
programme.desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey is all the buzz when it -- and her beehive -- go missing from her farm; Mayor Goodway's purse disappears, along with its precious cargo, Chickaletta.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Stop a Coconut Catapult; Pups Save Humdinger's Goose
programme.desc: The pups leap into action when Digi and Tal's coconut catapult goes rampant and rockets off through the jungle targeting birds and monkeys.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Hum-nata; Pups Stop the Foggy Skies
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Marshall Kitty gets trapped inside a life-sized piñata; Mayor Humdinger tries pushing fog into Adventure Bay, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find animals missing in the clouds and save the day.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty crew get lazy when their moms take over the Krusty Krab; Patrick's new pet rock catches the eye of a mischievous rock collector.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Evolving from single-celled yellow organisms at the dawn of time, Minions live to serve, but find themselves working for a continual series of unsuccessful masters, from T. Rex to Napoleon. Without a master to grovel for, the Minions fall into a deep depression. But one minion, Kevin, has a plan; accompanied by his pals Stuart and Bob, Kevin sets forth to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. Their search leads them to Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever super-villainess.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: With Baby Corp's stinkless serum in enemy hands, Turtleneck Superstar CEO Baby issues a challenge to deliver a new formula by 5 p.m.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After struggling to relate to Shelby's interests, Lance tries to bond with her at a live-action role-play event; Lana tries to save the town garbage man's job when she finds out the mayor is replacing him with an automated garbage truck.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When two halves of an ancient medallion reunite, SpongeBob and his friends find themselves in the city of Atlantis, where the king gives them a tour.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their dad.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe spot Chandler getting into a car with a mystery blonde; the friends reminisce about memorable moments.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A blizzard causes Phoebe and Mike's wedding to spiral out of control; uptight Monica steps in as her friend's wedding planner, then drives everyone crazy.

programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny share secrets while Leonard is away; Wolowitz helps Raj get over his ex.
